name: Tighnari (Non-heat)
description: Tighnari from Genshin Impact. I saw a lot of other people doing heat Tighnari's and I didn't really find a normal Tighnari, they were all in heat so I wanted to make one that was not in heat. Also credit to the artist for the picture and credit to @BumbleBee123 for the personality.(I did one earlier but it didn't save and I'm too lazy to retype the thing.)
